title: Fix hot restart & boot.md message persistence and visibility
summary: Boot messages and hot restart responses vanish after restart because they're never persisted to session history and never reach Telegram. This proposal adds message persistence, creates timestamped Boot sessions instead of reusing 'boot-startup', and sends Telegram notifications on hot restarts.

affectedFiles.description: Add message persistence to boot.ts handleChat calls (hot restart + full BOOT.md). Resolve previous session Telegram ID and send notification on hot restart.
Create timestamped boot session IDs instead of reusing 'boot-startup'. Persist boot responses to session history. Mark boot sessions with tags.
